---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

One sentence describing the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve? Which component of the framework does it affect?

## Proposed design

Describe how you'd implement it. Which module(s) would change? Would it require new configuration keys in topology.yaml or pipeline_params.yaml?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.
